MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Lonny Lee Bristow, Esq., appearing in Propria Persona via telephone conference.
Order to Show Cause to plaintiff, for failure to file proof(s) of service; obtain answer(s) or ented default(s) against defendant(s) is heard this day. Court ordered case dismissed at the request of plaintiff in Propria Persona. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport. (212)
